summary: Completed frontend testing of lesson HTML/Visual editor mode toggle and admin-to-teacher data synchronization. All features working correctly.

design_issues.screen: Admin Lesson Modal / Teacher Lesson Modal
issues: Console warning: Missing DialogDescription (aria-describedby) for accessibility - minor, not blocking
Console warning: Invalid HTML nesting span inside tbody/tr - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality
Console warning: quill 'bullet' format registration - cosmetic only, editor works correctly

admin_editor_mode_toggle: Visual mode active by default when opening lesson modal
Toggle buttons 'Визуальный редактор' and 'HTML код' visible
Clicking 'HTML код' switches to HTML textarea mode
Clicking 'Визуальный редактор' switches back to WYSIWYG editor
admin_html_editing: HTML textarea visible in HTML mode
Raw HTML can be entered directly
HTML content includes h2, p, strong, ul, li tags
HTML content saved correctly to backend
admin_visual_editing: ReactQuill WYSIWYG editor loads in visual mode
Toolbar with formatting options visible (bold, italic, lists, etc.)
Content entered in HTML mode preserved when switching to visual
Lesson saves successfully from both modes
teacher_fresh_data_sync: Teacher loads fresh lesson data from server on lesson open
No caching issues - updated content appears immediately
HTML content renders correctly (headings, bold, lists)
Timestamp test confirms fresh data (admin: 1772192171, teacher: 1772192171)

critical_code_review_comments: MOCKED API: modules_db and lessons_db are in-memory storage in server.py - data will be lost on server restart
DashboardPage.jsx properly fetches fresh data via axios.get on lesson open (line 109)
AdminDashboardPage.jsx correctly implements editorMode state toggle between 'visual' and 'html'
seed_data_creation: Created test lesson 'Test Lesson HTML Mode' with HTML content during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: HTML/Visual editor mode toggle working correctly. Teacher fresh data loading implemented via direct API call on lesson open. Admin credentials: test_admin@test.ru/test_admin. Teacher credentials: test@test.ru/test
